lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Greetings. What wisdom do you seek?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Me? I'm here to grant you rewards for any of the Pizazz Points you may have earned in this training arena. Like my fellow Guardians, I am part of the arena and live to ensure its safe running.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I trade my Pizazz Points please?

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Why of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got anything else I can buy?

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Well, we do stock a special book that you may be interested in, which provides a comprehensive guide to this training arena. It costs 200 coins. Would you like one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds useful. Yes please.

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Very good, that'll be 200 coins please!

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have enough money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want some dusty old book.

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: It's not old and it certainly isn't dusty, but suit yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I already have one.

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Let me know if you lose it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, bye!

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Use what you've learned, young one.

sections.title: If Entrance Guardian hasn't been spoken to

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Greetings. Have you spoken to my fellow Guardian downstairs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Rewards Guardian
lines.text: Well, you need to talk to him first.
